---
time: 2026-05-12T19:20:14-04:00
kind: commit
author: Mike Thicke
refs:
    - git:01f98bd8585f93680424c7b25af86fe044c30065
summary: Add dual-tab Q&A (Node/Session) and bottom-up dir/repo explanations with hash-based cache invalidation
---

v0.2: dir/repo explanations + dual-tab Q&A

Q&A is now split into two tabs in the explanation pane (Node / Session)
cycled with [ / ], replacing the single tab + T-toggle originally
specified. Node mode keeps per-NodeID threads with stable focus
injection; session mode keeps a single rolling log and stamps each
question with a [focus: path::sym] tag plus the current source.

Dir and repo explanations are generated bottom-up: each parent
synthesizes a one-line summary view of its immediate children (cached
file/dir prose where available, tree-sitter symbol counts otherwise),
then runs it through Provider.Explain. The view text is hashed for the
cache key so a re-explained child naturally invalidates its parents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

```
.claude/settings.json                               |  14 ++++++++++++++
 DESIGN.md                                           |  10 +++++-----
 internal/index/dir.go                               | 441 
 internal/index/dir_test.go                          |  89 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 internal/llm/claude/claude.go                       |  13 +++++++++----
 internal/tui/model.go                               | 224 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++-----------------------------------------
```
